title: List of Cultural Properties of Japan - paintings (Kagoshima)
rows: The Artist 's Studio , by Kuroda Seiki 黒田清輝作「アトリエ」 Kuroda Seiki-saku atorie
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )
oil on canvas ; the atelier of Raphaël Collin , Kuroda Seiki 's teacher at the Académie Colarossi in Paris
Six Episodes from the Eruption of Sakurajima , by Kuroda Seiki 黒田清輝作「桜島噴火連作6点」 Kuroda Seiki-saku Sakurajima funka rensaku 6-ten
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )

in Kagoshima from 8 January 1914 due to his father 's illness , Kuroda Seiki witnessed a major eruption of Sakurajima and created , in oil on wooden panels , a series of six paintings showing the Plume of smoke ( 噴煙 ) , Eruption ( 噴火 ) , Lava ( 溶岩 ) , Ash fall ( 降灰 ) , Devastation ( 荒廃 ) , and Steam ( 湯気 )
Bamboo , by Hatta Tomonori 八田知紀筆「竹」 Hatta Tomonori hitsu take
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )
Study of a Nude , by Fujishima Takeji 裸体習作 藤島武二 ratai shūsaku Fujishima Takeji
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )
oil on canvas ; from Fujishima Takeji 's study days in France
Chinese Landscape , by Fujishima Takeji 藤島武二作「中国風景」 Fujishima Takeji-saku Chūgoku fūkei
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )

oil on canvas ; Fujishima Takeji travelled to China in 1937 to serve as judge for the inaugural Manchuria Fine Arts Exhibition ( 満州美術展 ) ( Manten ) ; the following year his travels took him to Mongolia , Chengde , and Peking
Red Matches , by Wada Eisaku 和田英作作「赤い燐寸」 Wada Eisaku-saku akai matchi
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )

oil on canvas ; entered in the eighth Bunten exhibition in 1914 ; Wada Eisaku 's friend Shibusawa Hideo ( 澁沢秀雄 ) , at the time a student at Tokyo Imperial University , served as model during a trip to Toi on the Izu Peninsula
Suzanna , by Arishima Ikuma 有島生馬作「スザンナ」 Arishima Ikuma-saku Suzanna
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )
Parisian daughter , by Arishima Ikuma 有島生馬作「巴里娘」 Arishima Ikuma-saku Pari musume
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )
Court ladies , emakimono , by Momota Ryūei 桃田柳栄筆 「官女図巻」一巻 Momota Ryūei hitsu kannyo zu kan ichi-kan
Kagoshima City ( kept at Kagoshima City Museum of Art )

description: This table provides information about cultural properties of Japan, specifically paintings located in Kagoshima. It includes details such as the name of the property, its date, associated municipality, ownership, and additional comments about the artwork or its context.
